ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code for the size category (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "height_cmft" TEXT /* Height measurement range in cm and ft */,
  "chest_cmin" TEXT /* Chest measurement range in cm and in */,
  "waist_cmin" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in cm and in */,
  "hips_cmin" TEXT /* Hips measurement range in cm and in */,
  "shoulder_width_cmin" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement range in cm and in */,
  "inseam_length_cmin" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement range in cm and in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique SKU for the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_fit_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "customer_height_cm" TEXT /* Customer's height in cm */,
  "customer_weight_kg" TEXT /* Customer's weight in kg */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_fit_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., sales, customer preferences) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report in JSON format */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
